body:
This pull request sets the compat entry for the `DataStructures` package to `0.18`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
Note: Consider registering a new release of your package immediately after merging this PR, as downstream packages may depend on this for tests to pass.
title: CompatHelper: add new compat entry for DataStructures at version 0.18, (keep existing compat)

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `MPI` package from `0.19` to `0.19, 0.20`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for MPI to 0.20, (keep existing compat)

body: This PR removes a patch for ProfileCanvas that is no longer needed
title: Remove no longer needed patch

body:
This PR adds some Aqua tests for:
 - Unbound type parameters
 - Method ambiguities
title: Add Aqua tests
